milestoneTitle: Phase M9.19a.5 — Duration chip always carries a time on task tiles. User flagged the em-dash '—' looking dumb when a Learn item has no authored minutes. renderLearnItemRow and renderDashLearn now default to 10m whenever minutes isn't set — 'roughly a short tutorial' placeholder. Future authored content will require minutes at authoring time (tutorial creation will enforce it); defaulting here keeps the chip populated in the meantime so every task tile reads as something actionable. Projects (no duration concept) keep data-empty='1'; the CSS rule .dash-tile-duration[data-empty='1'] now sets visibility: hidden instead of rendering a muted em-dash, so the 40px slot stays reserved for cross-surface alignment but no filler text appears on project tiles.
